name: cpp-15-x86-64-linux-gnu
title: cpp-15-x86-64-linux-gnu
description:
GNU C preprocessor for x86_64-linux-gnu
A macro processor that is used automatically by the GNU C compiler
to transform programs before actual compilation.
.
This package has been separated from gcc for the benefit of those
who require the preprocessor configured for the
x86_64-linux-gnu architecture but not the compiler.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15.
arguments.raw: -linux-gnu-cpp-15  Option present in package usage line for x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15 because GNU C preprocessor for x86_64-linux-gnu.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `x86_64-linux-gnu-cpp-15 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
